compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Ships at Sea
- Steam AppID of the game: 1266540

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT
- Video driver version: Mesa 25.1.1
- Kernel version: 6.14.9-zen1
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/bjo81/9b2d3bf0afb42bcd6cec26d551c60d1f
- Proton version: proton-9.0-4e

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Ingame within the ships a radio could play radio streams.  These don't work.


## Reproduction

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ae61ee7e-c340-4c16-adfd-9378a9310d16)
Switch on the radio and press "source". Streams like "Simulator Radio" appear, it seems it tries to connect but fails.

[steam-1266540.log.tar.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/20532980/steam-1266540.log.tar.gz)
symptom_summary:
用户在将《帝国时代4》的语言设置为西班牙语后，游戏无法启动，出现黑屏，游戏鼠标可见，但随后关闭。 

Tags: Game Crash, Black Screen, Language Issue

issue_title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game (293760)
compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game
- Steam AppID of the game: 293760

## System Information
- GPU: Radeon RX 6900 XT
- Driver/LLVM version: 4.6 Mesa 22.1.0-devel (git-a5fa7e0 2022-02-24 focal-oibaf-ppa)
- Kernel version: 5.15.6-051506-generic
- Link to full system information: https://gist.github.com/RoyvEmpel/a55110925f17b75ac24fdc1f07d5f96f
- Proton version: 7.0-1

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

[steam-293760.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/8150005/steam-293760.log)

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Launching the game simply does nothing, adding PROTON_NO_D3D11 / PROTON_NO_D3D10 to the launch options starts the game launcher but that crashes / hangs after a few seconds.

The game it self does run when using the 'No Launcher' option but that makes it so you can't use workshop content. (the launcher enables them)

I looked at protonDB and tried using the windows 7 setting & installing dotnet 4.5.2 but that didn't work.

## Reproduction
1. Install automation on steam
2. Start the game
3. Select the first launch option
4. Press play
5. Game doesn't start
symptom_summary:
用户在启动《Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game》时遇到问题，游戏无法启动，使用特定启动选项时游戏启动器崩溃或挂起。即使使用“无启动器”选项，游戏也无法使用工作坊内容。

Tags: Game Won't Start, Crashes, Hangs, Missing Features

compatibility_report:
Kingdom Come Deliverance 2 - Xbox Controller not recognized, PS5 controller is.

Issue transferred from https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/9350.
@fsyy posted on 2025-12-30T17:27:18:

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Kingdome Come Deliverance 2
- Steam AppID of the game: 

[steam-1771300.log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24385772/steam-1771300.log)

1771300

## System Information
- GPU: RTX 2080
- Video driver version: 590.48.01
- Kernel version: 6.18.2-zen2-1-zen
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/fsyy/be58bcd2428263c780cc0a92fc8744ab
- Proton version: Proton 10.0-3

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms 

KCD2 started to not recognizing my xbox controller anymore. I tried updating to latest firmware of the controller, which did not help. Disabling/Enabling steam input did not help. But in the game settings in the controller submenu, it said mouse and scrolling down Dual Sense (no dual sense connected). So i plugged in my PS5 controller and voila, it worked.

Edit: I forgot to add that i did not see that behaviour in any other games i play with the xbox controllers.


## Reproduction

I do not exactly know how to reproduce, it suddenly occured. On my system it is reproducible using either (lsusb) this: Microsoft Corp. Xbox One Controller nor that one: Microsoft Corp. Xbox Controller.

Support of developer stops when they hear linux.
symptom_summary:
用户在《王国来临：救赎2》中遇到的问题是Xbox控制器无法被识别，而PS5控制器则可以正常使用。尽管尝试了更新固件和调整Steam输入设置，问题依然存在。

Tags: Controller Issues, Input Recognition, Game Compatibility

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Tower!3D Pro
- Steam AppID of the game: 588190

## System Information
- GPU: RTX 3090ti
- Video driver version: 560.35.03
- Kernel version: 6.11.0-5-cachyos-lto
- Link to full system information report as Gist:  [Gist](https://gist.github.com/joni999/93970273b3810a693db63daea2acff57)
- Proton version: Proton 9.0-3

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

Proton Log:
[steam-588190.log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/17077892/steam-588190.log)

An important error with the speech recognition seems to be:
```
1561.239:0724:0728:trace:mscoree:wine_mono_assembly_preload_hook_v2_fn "System.Speech, Version=3.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=31bf3856ad364e35"
1561.240:0724:0728:trace:mscoree:wine_mono_assembly_preload_hook_v2_fn "System.Speech, Version=3.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=31bf3856ad364e35" #
Unhandled Exception:
System.TypeLoadException: Could not load type of field 'towerspeakbridge.Speak:synth' (1) due to: Could not load file or assembly 'System.Speech, Version=3.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=31bf3856ad364e35' or one of its dependencies.
```

## Symptoms

Speech Recognition does not work.
In this game you can use your voice to give commands to airplanes, similar to real life.
Unfortunately this does not work on Linux as it seems to use some windows components.
Also the pilots in the planes should talk back to you in synthesized/artificial voices, but this also does not work and seems to have the same root cause as the first issue.

The rest of the game works without issue.

## Reproduction

1) Start the game
2) go into options
3) Press "Test speech" - You should then hear a synthesized voiceline

To test the voice commands I would recommend to start a round and try inputting voice commands by pressing the "shift" key - After the "ding" sound you should be able to say any command into a connected microphone and it should be recognized and shown up in the top.

![Screenshot_20240920_181456](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/30b4a273-faad-4b1c-a13d-de52efdb656d)


Similar issue in the sequel: #8115
symptom_summary:
用户在运行《Tower!3D Pro》时遇到语音识别功能无法正常工作的问题，导致无法通过语音指令控制飞机，并且合成语音反馈也无法发出。游戏的其他部分正常运行。

**Tag Suggestions:**  
Speech Recognition  
Audio Issues  
Functionality Loss
